creator: doctorwhoguy@gmail.com
text: Have you had a chance to look into this? I encountered the "qt.network.ssl: QSslSocket: cannot resolve SSL_CTX_set1_groups" and segfault error with another application (not in ports) called Orion which is a desktop client for Twitch. I Googled the error, and this bug came up. Maybe the issue is with the QT library since there are at least two applications segfaulting with the same error.
